hero.title: Answers for planning with confidence.
hero.description: Find quick guidance about accounts, travel discovery, bookings, privacy, and support across Morocco Discovery.

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.description: Login, signup, profiles, and saved preferences.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.description: Data, OAuth providers, cookies, and account control.

sidebar.title: Need a direct answer?
sidebar.description: For account, booking, or privacy questions that are not covered here, contact the Morocco Discovery team.

questions.question: Do I need an account to browse Morocco Discovery?
questions.answer: No. You can explore destinations and restaurants without signing in. An account is useful for profile features, saved preferences, and personalized travel planning.

questions.question: Can I sign in with Google or Facebook?
questions.answer: Yes. Morocco Discovery supports social login through Supabase OAuth. Google and Facebook sign-ins use the same secure callback flow in the app.

questions.question: Where can I see my account details?
questions.answer: After signing in, open My Profile from the navigation bar. Your profile page shows account details and includes a sign-out option.

questions.question: Can I use Morocco Discovery to plan a full trip?
questions.answer: The site is designed to help you compare destinations, places to stay, and dining options. Curated itinerary features can be expanded as your travel planning workflow grows.

questions.question: Are restaurant and destination listings bookable?
questions.answer: Listings are presented as discovery and planning resources. If a place supports booking or direct inquiry, the page can route users toward the available action.

questions.question: How are destinations selected?
questions.answer: Destinations are curated around cultural value, travel appeal, local identity, and how well they fit the Morocco Discovery experience.

questions.question: Does Morocco Discovery process payments?
questions.answer: Not currently. If payments are added later, checkout details should be handled by a dedicated payment provider rather than stored directly in the app.

questions.question: Will I be charged for creating an account?
questions.answer: No. Creating an account does not create a charge. Any future paid service should show pricing clearly before purchase.

questions.question: What information is collected when I sign in?
questions.answer: The app may receive basic account details such as your email, name, authentication provider, and profile metadata. You can review the privacy policy for a fuller explanation.

questions.question: How are sessions protected?
questions.answer: Authentication is handled with Supabase sessions and server-side checks for protected pages such as your profile.

questions.question: Where can I read the privacy policy?
questions.answer: The privacy policy is available at /privacy-policy and explains data collection, cookies, OAuth providers, retention, and contact options.
